package rulecoverage

// Negative scenario for duplicate_struct_tag_key: shows the preferred shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Struct field tags that repeat the same key more than once.
type NegativeDuplicateStructTagKeyUser struct {
    ID string `json:"id" db:"id"`
}

func (u *NegativeDuplicateStructTagKeyUser) IDValue() string { return u.ID }
func (u *NegativeDuplicateStructTagKeyUser) Rename(id string) { u.ID = id }
